title: Supply Chain Manager - FM Logistic India - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Supply Chain Manager - FM Logistic India - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
FM Logistic India invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Supply Chain Manager at our Hyderabad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About FM Logistic India:
FM Logistic India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Flexible working hours
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with FM Logistic India!
